---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Use Case**
What are you trying to do? What agent pipeline are you trying to model?

**Proposed Feature**
What would you add or change?

**Zero-Dependency Constraint**
This project ships as 3 files with no build step. How does your feature fit within that constraint?
